ware.name: Atmospheric Oxygen
ware.description: Refined oxygen for station life support.

ware.name: Structural Glass
ware.description: Industrial grade glass panels for station domes.

ware.name: Chemical Compounds
ware.description: Industrial catalysts used in advanced synthesis.

ware.name: Purified Water
ware.description: Potable water refined for high-density habitation.

ware.name: Industrial Fabrics
ware.description: Synthetic textiles used in station habitation modules.

ware.name: Industrial Components
ware.description: Specialized parts used for factory upkeep and efficiency.

ware.name: Defused Mine Hardware
ware.description: Recovered enemy mine casings and inert explosive components.

ware.name: Oxygen Electrolysis Plant
ware.description: Refines hydrogen and water into atmospheric grade oxygen.

ware.name: Glass Smelter
ware.description: High-heat refinery for converting ore into structural glass panels.

ware.name: Chemical Synthesis Lab
ware.description: Produces industrial catalysts from gas and energy.

ware.name: Water Purification Center
ware.description: Advanced filtration and chemical treatment for potable water.

ware.name: Polymer Textile Mill
ware.description: Weaves synthetic fabrics from chemical and water inputs.

ware.name: Industrial Component Foundry
ware.description: Precision manufacturing of maintenance and upgrade kits.

ware.name: Civilian Electronics Fab
ware.description: High-tech assembly line for consumer-grade station technologies.

ware.name: Glass
ware.description: The substance created from Glass Refineries

ware.tags: combat standard equipment weapon noblueprint combatdrone
